publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Code review; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Code review: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Review quality is measured by the number of comments, and personal style differences should block a correct change.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Prioritize evidence-backed defects and risks, label optional suggestions, and verify resolutions against requirements and tests with respectful, specific language.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Prioritize evidence-backed defects and risks, label optional suggestions, and verify resolutions against requirements and tests with respectful, specific language.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Code review instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Prioritize evidence-backed defects and risks, label optional suggestions, and verify resolutions against requirements and tests with respectful, specific language.
Review quality is measured by the number of comments, and personal style differences should block a correct change.
